title: Initialize monorepo apps and shared package
description: Create the repository structure with apps/web, apps/worker, and packages/shared, including package manifests and runnable dev scripts.
acceptance_criteria: Directories apps/web, apps/worker, and packages/shared exist.
Root package scripts can start web and worker processes.
A fresh clone can run install and start commands without missing workspace errors.
constraints: Keep all code in one repository.
Do not add queue or microservice infrastructure.
Use Node.js and TypeScript for runtime code.

title: Add coding standards document
description: Create docs/coding-standards.md defining naming conventions, folder boundaries, error handling rules, testing expectations, and PR checklist requirements.
acceptance_criteria: File docs/coding-standards.md exists.
Document includes sections for naming, architecture boundaries, testing, linting, and type safety.
PR checklist section contains verifiable quality checks before merge.
constraints: Document must be specific to this repository structure.
Rules must be testable or reviewable.
Do not include non-actionable policy language.

title: Add LLM adapter contract document
description: Create docs/agent-contracts.md specifying that all LLM calls must route through Codex/Copilot adapters and defining allowed context payload structure.
acceptance_criteria: File docs/agent-contracts.md exists.
Document explicitly forbids direct provider SDK calls outside adapter modules.
Document defines required request and response schema fields for adapter calls.
constraints: Allowed providers are only codex and copilot.
Contract must enforce small structured context.
Keep scope to implementation requirements only.

title: Configure repository linting
description: Add ESLint configuration and scripts so all workspace packages can be linted from root.
acceptance_criteria: Root lint script runs lint checks across web, worker, and shared packages.
Lint command exits non-zero when violations exist.
CI can execute lint command non-interactively.
constraints: One root lint entrypoint only.
No package-specific lint behavior that bypasses root command.
Configuration must support TypeScript code.

title: Enable strict TypeScript type checks
description: Create shared strict TypeScript configuration and add a root typecheck script that fails on any compiler error.
acceptance_criteria: tsconfig base config exists and is extended by each package.
Root typecheck script runs checks for all packages.
Typecheck command exits non-zero on any type error.
constraints: Strict mode must be enabled.
No implicit any or skipped type checks in runtime packages.
Typecheck must run in CI without watch mode.

title: Create Postgres migration for core workflow tables
description: Add initial migration creating findings, tasks, runs, and artifacts tables with required keys and indexes.
acceptance_criteria: Migration creates findings, tasks, runs, and artifacts tables.
Foreign keys enforce findings->tasks->runs->artifacts relationships.
Indexes exist for tasks(state) and runs(task_id).
constraints: Only four workflow tables in v1.
All workflow state must be stored in Postgres.
Migration must be idempotent through migration tool semantics.

title: Implement task lifecycle transition validator
description: Create shared validation logic for task state transitions: awaiting_approval, approved, in_progress, done, failed, including manual retry path failed->approved.
acceptance_criteria: Allowed transitions are accepted.
Disallowed transitions are rejected with deterministic errors.
Validator is imported by both API and worker modules.
constraints: No state transitions outside validator.
Retry transition must be explicit and manual.
State set must remain limited to v1 lifecycle.

title: Implement finding ingest API route
description: Create API endpoint that stores a finding and creates one matching task in awaiting_approval within a single transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Valid request inserts one finding row and one task row.
New task state is awaiting_approval.
Invalid payloads return validation errors without partial writes.
constraints: Inline normalization only in v1.
Endpoint input must use strict schema validation.
Transaction rollback required on any failure.

title: Implement task list API route
description: Create API endpoint to return task queue data including state and latest run summary with optional state filtering.
acceptance_criteria: Response includes task id, title, state, and latest run summary fields.
State filter parameter returns only matching tasks.
Tasks are returned in deterministic sort order.
constraints: Read-only endpoint.
Payload should be compact for UI consumption.
No pagination requirement for initial v1.

title: Implement task approval and retry API route
description: Create endpoint logic to transition awaiting_approval->approved and failed->approved using the shared transition validator.
acceptance_criteria: Approving awaiting_approval task changes state to approved.
Retrying failed task changes state to approved.
Invalid source states return deterministic transition errors.
constraints: No automatic approvals.
Must use shared transition validator.
State updates must be transactional.

title: Implement worker claim API route
description: Create endpoint that atomically claims one approved task, creates a run record, and sets task state to in_progress using row-level locking.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent requests cannot claim the same task.
Successful claim creates exactly one run row linked to the task.
When no approved tasks exist, endpoint returns an empty claim result.
constraints: Use Postgres transaction with row-level lock semantics.
One task claim per call.
No external queue service.

title: Implement run completion API route
description: Create endpoint that records step outcomes, persists artifacts, and finalizes task state to done or failed.
acceptance_criteria: Run row receives final state and ended_at timestamp.
Task is marked done only when CI and review both pass.
Task is marked failed with stored failure_reason on any failure path.
constraints: Use transactional updates.
Apply transition validation before final task update.
Artifacts must be written to Postgres.

title: Implement shared LLM provider interface
description: Create a provider abstraction that defines one request schema and one response schema for all model calls.
acceptance_criteria: Provider interface module is imported by execute and review steps.
Request schema includes model provider, prompt payload, timeout, and token limits.
Response schema includes success/failure, output, and usage metadata fields.
constraints: Interface must be provider-agnostic.
Payload must remain structured and bounded.
No direct provider-specific code in worker step modules.

title: Implement Codex adapter
description: Implement the Codex adapter conforming to the shared provider interface and enforce timeout/token guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Adapter compiles and satisfies provider interface contract.
Adapter returns normalized success and error payloads.
Timeout and token guardrails are enforced per call.
constraints: Adapter must be callable only through provider interface.
No fallback to other providers inside adapter.
Do not expose provider secrets in logs/artifacts.

title: Implement Copilot adapter
description: Implement the Copilot adapter conforming to the shared provider interface and enforce timeout/token guardrails.
acceptance_criteria: Adapter compiles and satisfies provider interface contract.
Adapter returns normalized success and error payloads.
Timeout and token guardrails are enforced per call.
constraints: Adapter must be callable only through provider interface.
No fallback to other providers inside adapter.
Do not expose provider secrets in logs/artifacts.

title: Implement polling worker loop
description: Build worker main loop that polls claim endpoint at fixed interval and processes one task at a time through execute, ci, and review steps.
acceptance_criteria: Worker polls on fixed schedule and does not crash on empty queue.
Worker processes at most one claimed task concurrently.
Worker always submits run completion with success or failure.
constraints: Polling architecture only.
No parallel task execution in v1.
Hard runtime timeout per run is enforced.

title: Implement execution step wrapper
description: Create execution step that assembles task-scoped context, invokes selected provider adapter, and writes execution artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: Execution step sends only task-scoped structured context.
Step writes prompt summary and response summary artifacts.
Step returns deterministic success/failure object to worker loop.
constraints: No full-repo context payloads.
Calls must go through provider interface only.
Stored artifact size must be bounded.

title: Implement CI command step wrapper
description: Create CI step that executes configured quality/build command, captures exit code, and stores truncated log artifact.
acceptance_criteria: Step returns pass/fail based on process exit code.
Step stores CI log tail artifact for debugging.
Step surfaces timeout errors as failed result.
constraints: Single configured CI command for v1.
Local command execution only.
Log capture must have maximum size limit.

title: Implement review step wrapper
description: Create review step that sends change summary and CI summary to selected adapter and produces pass/fail rationale artifact.
acceptance_criteria: Review step input includes structured change and CI summaries.
Step output includes boolean pass flag and textual rationale.
Review result artifact is persisted for every run.
constraints: Review call must use provider interface only.
Review cannot mark done when CI failed.
Prompt context must remain compact and structured.

title: Add unit tests for state machine and adapters
description: Implement unit tests validating transition rules and provider adapter contract behavior including error normalization.
acceptance_criteria: All allowed and disallowed transitions are covered by tests.
Provider interface contract tests run for both Codex and Copilot adapters.
Unit tests run in CI and fail on assertion errors.
constraints: Tests must be deterministic.
No external network dependency in unit tests.
Adapter tests may use mocks for provider responses.

title: Add integration tests for API transitions and claim locking
description: Implement integration tests covering finding ingest, approval/retry transitions, run completion logic, and concurrent claim safety.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify ingest creates finding and task in one flow.
Tests verify invalid state transitions are rejected.
Concurrent claim test proves a task can only be claimed once.
constraints: Use test Postgres database.
Tests must run non-interactively in CI.
Reset database state between test cases.

title: Add end-to-end lifecycle tests
description: Implement end-to-end tests for one successful run path and one failure path through full task lifecycle.
acceptance_criteria: Success scenario ends with task state done.
Failure scenario ends with task state failed and reason stored.
Both scenarios verify artifacts are persisted.
constraints: Use deterministic stubs for external provider calls.
Scenarios must run in CI runtime budget.
No manual test steps allowed.

title: Enforce coverage threshold for critical modules
description: Configure test coverage checks for state machine, worker orchestration, and LLM adapter modules.
acceptance_criteria: Coverage report is generated in CI.
CI fails when configured threshold is not met.
Coverage includes state machine, worker steps, and adapter modules.
constraints: Threshold must be explicit in config.
Coverage checks must run in same CI pipeline as tests.
Do not block on non-critical modules in v1.

title: Create CI workflow with quality gates
description: Add CI workflow to run install, lint, typecheck, unit tests, integration tests, and build on pull requests and pushes to main.
acceptance_criteria: Workflow triggers on pull_request and push to main.
Workflow executes lint, typecheck, test, and build jobs.
Workflow returns failed status if any quality gate fails.
constraints: Use one canonical CI workflow file for v1.
Workflow must run without interactive prompts.
Commands must map to root package scripts.

title: Enforce required status checks for merges
description: Configure repository branch protection so main cannot be merged unless CI quality checks pass.
acceptance_criteria: Main branch requires CI status checks before merge.
Merge is blocked when lint/typecheck/tests/build fail.
Configuration is documented in repository setup instructions.
constraints: Protect main branch only for v1.
No bypass rules for standard contributors.
Status check names must match workflow outputs.

title: Create CD workflow with auto-deploy and artifact fallback
description: Add CD workflow that auto-deploys on main when deploy secrets and target config are present, otherwise publishes versioned build artifacts as release candidates.
acceptance_criteria: Workflow runs after successful CI on main.
When deploy configuration exists, workflow executes deployment step.
When deploy configuration is absent, workflow publishes versioned artifacts and release metadata.
constraints: Do not fail pipeline solely due to missing optional deploy target in v1.
Deployment and artifact paths must be mutually exclusive and explicit.
Secrets must never be printed to logs.

title: Build task queue UI page
description: Implement queue view listing tasks by lifecycle state with approve and retry actions wired to APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Queue page shows task title, state, and latest run summary.
Approve action transitions awaiting_approval tasks.
Retry action transitions failed tasks to approved.
constraints: Keep UI minimal and operational.
Use existing API contracts only.
No advanced analytics widgets in v1.

title: Build task detail UI page
description: Implement detail page displaying run timeline summary, CI status, review status, provider used, and failure details.
acceptance_criteria: Detail page shows latest run state and timestamps.
Page displays CI and review outcomes with provider name.
Failure reason and artifact summaries are visible for failed runs.
constraints: Read-focused view with minimal controls.
Display compact artifact summaries only.
No extra workflow actions beyond approve/retry.

title: Add reproducible root quality scripts
description: Define root scripts for lint, typecheck, test, build, and ci to ensure local and CI parity.
acceptance_criteria: Root scripts lint, typecheck, test, build, and ci are present.
ci script executes quality gates in deterministic order.
Developer can run one command locally to mirror CI checks.
constraints: Script names and behavior must be stable for CI usage.
No package-specific hidden prerequisites.
Commands must complete in non-interactive environments.

title: Add failure triage and rollback runbook
description: Create docs/runbook.md describing how to investigate failed runs, rerun tasks safely, handle flaky tests, and execute deployment rollback.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook includes step-by-step triage for failed CI, failed review, and failed deploy.
Runbook includes explicit retry and rollback procedures.
Runbook references commands and file locations used by this repository.
constraints: Procedures must map to implemented scripts/workflows.
No environment-specific assumptions without notes.
Keep instructions actionable and concise.
